title: bidens angustata
intro: Bidens angustata, also known as narrow-leaved beggar-ticks or narrow-leaved burreed, is a perennial herb native to North America, belonging to the aster family. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been used to treat various health issues. The leaves of Bidens angustata are known to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, providing health benefits such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive problems. Bidens angustata is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
